name: Database transactions must complete within 30 seconds
description: Database transactions that exceed 30 seconds are automatically rolled back and the initiating query is logged. Transactions holding locks for more than 30 seconds block other operations and indicate a design defect.

policy.rationale: Long-running transactions hold locks that cascade into broader unavailability. A 30-second bound is generous for application logic and strict enough to prevent runaway queries from starving the system.
